title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Schneider Electric India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Schneider Electric India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Schneider Electric India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Schneider Electric India:
Schneider Electric India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India!
